label: Banner
summary: A 468×60 banner shell that scales proportionally below 500px, the one sanctioned proportional scale.
era: The 468×60 full banner of 1996: the only ad size that ever mattered.

classes.name: rs-banner
classes.role: 468×60 shell; scales down proportionally below 500px viewports

a11y: An image link: the alt text names the destination, not the artwork.
